creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
In the last 2-3 days I've sent 2 messages to this ML from yuri@FreeBSD.org

Subjects:
* Is there a procedure that checks that fetch from original URL doesn't fail?
* Do vuln*.xml file commits need to be merged into quarterly branches ?

Both were never delivered to the ML.

Few months ago my messages from the same address were always delivered.


Yuri
